cards.title: Gear
cards.text: Rods, tackle, and bait are typically included in the charter price — we confirm this upfront so you're not caught out on the day.

cards.title: Crew
cards.text: An experienced local skipper and crew who know the current fishing grounds — this matters more than the boat itself for a good catch rate.

cards.title: Your catch
cards.text: Most resorts and guesthouses will cook your catch for dinner on request — ask us to confirm this with your specific property before the trip.

cards.title: Group size
cards.text: Charters are typically priced per boat for big game trips and per person for reef/night trips — we'll clarify which applies to your quote.
